_README: EVERY piece of text on the site lives in this file. Edit it here (or via the /admin page) and the site updates — no code changes needed. Keys starting with an underscore are documentation and are ignored by the site.
_TIP: Keep the structure (field names) exactly as-is; only change the values. See content/SCHEMA.md for a field-by-field guide.

about._comment: Bio paragraphs, animated stat counters and quick highlight chips.
about.heading: Engineering products from first sketch to final test
bio: I am a goal-oriented Mechanical Engineer with 12 years of experience in design and development of new products and systems. My career spans two demanding industries: defense & aerospace, where I developed electro-mechanical missile seeker and surveillance systems, and semiconductor capital equipment, where I design wafer-processing platforms.

Currently a Staff Engineer / Technical Manager at Applied Materials in Bangalore, I lead modules for new PVD platform development — owning subsystems from requirement specification through design, analysis, prototyping and product validation, while mentoring young engineers along the way.

I believe in deep visualization, creative thinking and disciplined engineering: DFMA and lean design, value engineering, GD&T and tolerance stack-up, structural and thermal FEA, and rigorous risk management. Passionate about innovation — I love taking an idea and turning it into hardware that works.

items.summary: Module lead for multiple subsystems on a new platform for semi-critical PVD and adjacent applications.
highlights: Design & validation of subsystems from scratch — MRS to product validation through the PDP process
System & module pump-down calculations, pump sizing and vac-vent design
Electro-mechanical and vacuum interface design across the platform
Leading project execution with cross-functional collaboration and mentoring new engineers

items.summary: Mechanical design for a dry photoresist deposition tool enabling EUV lithography.
highlights: Concept development & selection for components and subsystems using Pugh trade-off matrix
Design of high-purity gas weldments & manifolds per P&ID for the Vapor Delivery System (VDS)
Cable harness design for optical and electrical cables per interconnect diagram
Tolerance analysis (WCS & RSS) with GD&T per ASME Y14.5; DFM/DFA-driven part-count and cost reduction
Conducted PDR, DDR and CDR design reviews; led project activities for the India team

items.summary: R&D design of electro-mechanical systems: RF seeker, MBK and AESA TR module.

Torque calculations & dynamic balancing of gimbal systems; actuator sizing and gearbox design per AGMA & DIN
Thermal design of RF seeker electronics and TR module; packaging of RF & DSP electronics
Design validation in ANSYS — structural, modal, thermal and random vibration per MIL-STD-810G / 461E
Fixtures for bench, functional and brazing processes; testing in anechoic chamber and MIL environmental tests
Product documentation to AS9100-D: D&D plans, BOMs, assembly & acceptance test procedures in SAP

projects._comment: Project cards shown in a grid; clicking a card opens a detail modal. 'image' can be a path like /projects/my-image.jpg placed in the public folder — leave empty ("") for a stylized placeholder graphic.
projects.heading: Featured Projects
projects.subheading: Products and systems I have designed, analyzed and delivered.

items.title: Semi-Critical PVD Platform
items.subtitle: New platform design for PVD & adjacent applications
items.description: Ground-up design of subsystems for a new semiconductor PVD platform — from Market Requirement Specification to validated product through the PDP process.
details: Module lead for multiple subsystems with full ownership from MRS (Market Requirement Specification) to product validation through the PDP process
System and module pump-down calculations, pump sizing and vac-vent design for the vacuum architecture
Electro-mechanical and vacuum interface design across the platform and adjacent applications
Component and subsystem design per functional requirements considering SEMI standards (S2, S8, S1, S6)
Concept development, ideation and selection using the Pugh trade-off matrix
BOM creation and configuration with product documentation per internal standards
Engineering change management — ECN/ECR (DDC, ECO and CA) for design changes
Risk management with DFMEA, Pareto charts and RCA across subsystems
Cross-functional collaboration with mechatronics, control systems, electronics, manufacturing, planning and purchase teams
Leading the team for project execution and mentoring new engineers

items.title: Dry Photoresist Deposition Tool
items.subtitle: Enabling EUV lithography
items.description: Mechanical design for a dry photoresist deposition tool for EUV lithography — high-purity gas delivery, precision hardware and cost-optimized subsystems.
details: Concept development and selection for components and subsystems per specifications using the Pugh trade-off matrix
Design of high-purity gas weldments and manifolds per P&ID for the Vapor Delivery System (VDS)
Cable harness design for optical and other cables per the interconnect diagram
Sheet-metal brackets and machined parts designed in NX with structural FEA in NX Nastran
Detailed design per DFX principles (DFM, DFA, DFC) — reduced part count, assembly time and machining cost
Execution and resolution of Problem Reports (PR) as technical owner
Conducted PDR, DDR and CDR design reviews; prepared and presented test plans for lab fit and function checks
Tolerance analysis (WCS & RSS) with GD&T applied per ASME Y14.5 to meet specifications
ECN/ECR (ECO and DDC) creation for implementing component and assembly changes
Risk management and mitigation plans presented in CFT forums using FMEA and Pareto charts
Led project activities for the India team and initiated internal knowledge-sharing sessions on the product and subsystems
items.imageAlt: Dry photoresist deposition tool for EUV lithography

items.title: RF Seeker Gimbal System
items.subtitle: Missile seeker electro-mechanical system
items.description: Design and development of a two-axis RF seeker gimbal — torque derivation, dynamic balancing, actuator & gearbox design, and full MIL-standard validation.
details: Requirements review through cross-functional team discussion and alignment
System architecture development, decomposition and integration plan creation and execution
Multiple concept generation with selection via Pugh matrix; reviews with authorities and customers to finalize concepts
Torque calculations for gimbals and dynamic balancing of the system to reduce torque requirements
Actuator sizing and gearbox design per AGMA & DIN standards in KISSsoft, including interface design
Fixture design for actuator load testing and backlash measurement, plus bench, functional and brazing process fixtures
Design calculations and selection of bearings, O-rings and feedback sensors (encoder, gyro) per functional and environmental requirements
Thermal design of the RF seeker system electronics
Design validation in ANSYS — structural, modal, thermal and random vibration per MIL-STD-810G / 461E
Drafting in NX and AutoCAD to IS 10714 / ASME Y14 with GD&T per ASME Y14.5M; stack-up analysis on critical assemblies
Product documentation per AS9100-D — D&D plans, BOMs, assembly procedures, acceptance and quality test plans, purchase indents in SAP
Design huddles plus detailed, critical and final design reviews with documentation release through the PDR process
Assembly and test plans; module, subsystem and system-level integration testing including anechoic chamber and MIL environmental tests
Failure analysis with RCA tools (fishbone, 5-why); risk management using DFMEA and Pareto charts
Manufacturing follow-up supporting the shop floor team; team leadership and mentoring of new engineers

items.title: AESA TR Module & MBK Packaging
items.subtitle: RF & DSP electronics packaging
items.description: Electronics packaging and thermal design for AESA transmit-receive modules and MBK — EMI/EMC-aware layouts, cable harness routing and MIL-grade environmental survival.
details: Thermal design and analysis of the AESA TR module and MBK electronics
Packaging of RF & DSP electronics based on electrical design inputs, in coordination with the PCB design team
PCB thermal analysis and cable routing (harness) with EMI/EMC and environmental considerations per MIL standards
Packaging of high-voltage electronics up to 10 kV
Concept generation and selection with design reviews through the PDR process
Design validation in ANSYS — structural, modal, thermal and random vibration
Test setup development and test-facility identification, including anechoic chamber and MIL environmental testing
Product documentation per AS9100-D with ECN/ECR for design changes

items.title: Vapor Delivery System (VDS)
items.subtitle: High-purity gas delivery hardware
items.description: Precision high-purity gas delivery hardware — weldments, manifolds and flow paths engineered to P&ID requirements with rigorous tolerance control.
details: High-purity gas weldment and manifold design per P&ID requirements for the vapor delivery system
Tolerance stack-up analysis (WCS & RSS) on critical sealing interfaces
GD&T application per ASME Y14.5M to meet functional specifications
Flow verification with Macro Flow and engineering calculations in MIT Calc
Materials, surface finishes and bought-out (COTS) component selection per functional and environmental requirements
Execution and resolution of Problem Reports (PR) as technical owner
Risk mitigation via DFMEA and Pareto analysis presented in CFT forums
Design reviews (PDR, DDR, CDR) with test plans for lab fit and function checks

items.title: Mono Wheel Electric Bike
items.subtitle: Single-wheel electric vehicle — project lead
items.description: Designed and fabricated a one-wheeled electric vehicle driven by a geared electric actuator — from concept generation through procurement, build and road testing.
details: One-wheeled, single-track vehicle similar to a unicycle — designed and fabricated end to end
Wheel driven by a geared electric actuator powered by batteries
Power transmission through an internal gear mechanism — module 3, gear ratio of 3
Top speed of 25 km/h with electro-mechanical brakes to stop the vehicle
As project lead: concept generation, design calculations, procurement of materials and bought-outs, project execution and testing
items.imageAlt: Krishna riding the mono wheel electric bike prototype
